note: go to normal mode via esc
go to normal mode via esc
repeat last search backward via search_prev
Y = yank line (select line then yank)
x deletes char (default selection then d)
SPC s r p (rg project) = global_search
SPC t n = toggle line numbers
SPC t n a = absolute line numbers
SPC t n r = relative line numbers
SPC t h h = toggle cursorline
